title: tephroseris helenitis subsp. salisburgensis
intro: Tephroseris helenitis subsp. salisburgensis, also known as Salzburg mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and menstrual cramps, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from menstrual pain. Tephroseris helenitis subsp. salisburgensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
